Quality First, Always: Meet Caribou Office
Apr 15, 2026     Founded by Scott Gillies and Kyle Gustafson, Caribou Office delivers high-quality, health-focused office products at accessible prices. See why Longmont businesses are taking notice.

The City Clerk’s Office connects residents with local government, ensuring transparency and accessibility of city records and documents. The Clerk is the official record keeper for city records and keeps the City seal, supports City Council and publishes all Council agendas and packets, oversees elections, processes liquor, marijuana retail and specialty business licenses, issues special event permits, processes open records requests, maintains the municipal code, and recruits for and manages board and commission members.
